name: GG Land
short_description: GG Land is the ultimate game dev experience. Build your dream game in minutes with our intuitive level builder and no-code logic creation tool, challenge friends in multiplayer mode, and explore others creations!
detailed_description:
Introducing GG Land: The ultimate playground for gamers & creators!
Build your dream game in minutes with our no-code tool, challenge friends in multiplayer mode, or explore endless creations!

Are you interested in building, sand, and boxes?
Then you will love our powerful, easy to use game building tool.
With this tool, you will have the power to create your own unique game in minutes!
Oh and if you decide to publish it, your creation will have full multiplayer support!
So get building, and challenge your friends to beat your game!

Are you more into playing and enjoying games rather than building them?
You are in luck!
There are tons of games, buildings, and creations ready to be explored.
And all of them support multiplayer!
But if that's not your vibe, you are welcome to play any game in single-player mode!

Key Features

  • Multiplayer support for all published games!
  • VR and Non-VR support!
  • Game saves for single-player gameplay.
  • Easy to use game builder.
  • No-code gameplay creation tool.
